title: glycine canescens
intro: Glycine canescens, also known as Sweet Shrub, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Oleaceae. The medicinal properties of Glycine canescens include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of using Glycine canescens include its ability to soothe digestive issues, alleviate respiratory problems, and reduce stress and anxiety. Herbal preparations of Glycine canescens can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
